TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_San_Andreas, title = San_Andreas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Andreas} }

S.FORM: Onini San Andreas hananay a ika i, ono pikari'ang tono palapalaan a demak, pasadaken no misaikaay, ci Brad Peyton aci Carlton Cuse, camira a tatosa ko miparatohay tona demak, palaheci nangra a mitilid tonini a demak i, ci Dwayne Johnson, Carla Gugino ato alomanay a matayalay itini tona ika a demakan, tatapangan noni a demak i, pakayni to atol hananay a demak, miri'ang to maamaan tona hekal. Onini a ika, nai 2014 a mihecan saka sepat a folad tosa polo' ira ko tosa a romi'ad a misatapang a matayal, itini i Australia ko pisatapangan, toya mihecaan to saka pito a folad tosa polo' ira ko pito ko kalahecian noni a demak, itini to San Francisco ko pisetekan a pahanhan toni a tayal, Saka tolo to ni Dwayne Douglas Johnson aci Brad Peyton a malacafay midemak a matayal to ika.
S.PHON: o~unini san anɬ~ɮrəas ħananaj a ika i, o~uno~u pikariʡaŋ to~uno~u paɾapaɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak, pasaɬ~ɮakən no~u misaikaaj, ʦi b~b~vraɬ~ɮ pəjto~un aʦi ʦarɾto~un ʦo~u~usə, ʦamira a tato~usa ko~u miparato~uħaj to~una ɬ~ɮəmak, paɾaħəʦi naŋra a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ʦi ɬ~ɮwajnə *o~uħnso~un, ʦarɾa *o~u~u*ino~u ato~u aɾo~umanaj a matajaɾaj itini to~una ika a ɬ~ɮəmakan, tatapaŋan no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak i, pakajni to~u ato~uɾ ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, miriʡaŋ to~u maamaan to~una ħəkaɾ. o~unini a ika, nai **** a miħəʦan saka səpat a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u to~usa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a misatapaŋ a matajaɾ, itini i ao~u~ustraɾia ko~u pisatapaŋan, to~uja miħəʦaan to~u saka pito~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u pito~u ko~u kaɾaħəʦian no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak, itini to~u san franʦisʦo~u ko~u pisətəkan a paħanħan to~uni a tajaɾ, saka to~uɾo~u to~u ni ɬ~ɮwajnə ɬ~ɮo~uo~u~u*ɾas *o~uħnso~un aʦi b~b~vraɬ~ɮ pəjto~un a maɾaʦafaj miɬ~ɮəmak a matajaɾ to~u ika.
S.FORM: Onini San Andreas hananay a ika i, ono pikari'ang tono palapalaan a demak, pasadaken no misaikaay, ci Brad Peyton aci Carlton Cuse, camira a tatosa ko miparatohay tona demak, palaheci nangra a mitilid tonini a demak i, ci Dwayne Johnson, Carla Gugino ato alomanay a matayalay itini tona ika a demakan, tatapangan noni a demak i, pakayni to atol hananay a demak, miri'ang to maamaan tona hekal. Onini a ika, nai 2014 a mihecan saka sepat a folad tosa polo' ira ko tosa a romi'ad a misatapang a matayal, itini i Australia ko pisatapangan, toya mihecaan to saka pito a folad tosa polo' ira ko pito ko kalahecian noni a demak, itini to San Francisco ko pisetekan a pahanhan toni a tayal, Saka tolo to ni Dwayne Douglas Johnson aci Brad Peyton a malacafay midemak a matayal to ika.
S.PHON: o~unini san anɬ~ɮrəas ħananaj a ika i, o~uno~u pikariʡaŋ to~uno~u paɾapaɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak, pasaɬ~ɮakən no~u misaikaaj, ʦi b~b~vraɬ~ɮ pəjto~un aʦi ʦarɾto~un ʦo~u~usə, ʦamira a tato~usa ko~u miparato~uħaj to~una ɬ~ɮəmak, paɾaħəʦi naŋra a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ʦi ɬ~ɮwajnə *o~uħnso~un, ʦarɾa *o~u~u*ino~u ato~u aɾo~umanaj a matajaɾaj itini to~una ika a ɬ~ɮəmakan, tatapaŋan no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak i, pakajni to~u ato~uɾ ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, miriʡaŋ to~u maamaan to~una ħəkaɾ. o~unini a ika, nai **** a miħəʦan saka səpat a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u to~usa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a misatapaŋ a matajaɾ, itini i ao~u~ustraɾia ko~u pisatapaŋan, to~uja miħəʦaan to~u saka pito~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u pito~u ko~u kaɾaħəʦian no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak, itini to~u san franʦisʦo~u ko~u pisətəkan a paħanħan to~uni a tajaɾ, saka to~uɾo~u to~u ni ɬ~ɮwajnə ɬ~ɮo~uo~u~u*ɾas *o~uħnso~un aʦi b~b~vraɬ~ɮ pəjto~un a maɾaʦafaj miɬ~ɮəmak a matajaɾ to~u ika.
